parameters.query: =SELECT * FROM clients WHERE id = '{{$json.body.clientId}}' AND status = 'active'
=INSERT INTO pages (client_id, url, page_type, status_code) VALUES ('{{$json.client_id}}', '{{$json.url}}', 'other', 200) ON CONFLICT (client_id, url) DO UPDATE SET updated_at = now() RETURNING id

=INSERT INTO page_speed_scores (page_id, performance_score, lcp, fid, cls, ttfb, device) SELECT id, {{$json.perfScore}}, {{$json.lcp}}, {{$json.fid}}, {{$json.cls}}, {{$json.ttfb}}, 'mobile' FROM pages WHERE client_id = '{{$json.client_id}}' AND url = '{{$json.url}}'

=INSERT INTO agent_action_log (client_id, module, action_type, summary, status, triggered_by) VALUES ('{{$json.client_id}}', 'technical', 'audit_complete', 'Audited {{$json.url}} - Performance: {{$json.perfScore}}/100', 'success', 'n8n-technical-audit')
